data.title: 国际服红冬推特贴集赞小活动 #2
data.summary: The first flyer from the Anonymous Red Winter Party People has arrived! It reads: "Behold! Look at t
data.body:
The first flyer from the Anonymous Red Winter Party People has arrived! 

It reads: "Behold! Look at these students, so bored they've collapsed on the floor!" 

If you spread the Red Winter Party People's flyers as they're revealed one by one, special content and rewards will be unlocked! 

➡️Event Details: https://forum.nexon.com/bluearchive-en/board_view?board=3218&thread=3418919

(Illust: Mee)
